page_title: Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time Original Soundtrack
text:
is the soundtrack album to the film Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time, and was released on 08 March 2023. It was composed by Shirō Sagisu and published by King Records via its label KING AMUSEMENT CREATIVE with the catalog number KIZX-90548~50. It was bundled with the limited edition home video release of Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time on King Amusement Creative's official webstore. https://vgmdb.net/album/123532 Like the previous "Original Soundtrack" releases, it features the score exactly as it appears in the film, as well as the film's credit songs performed by Hikaru Utada.

Tracklist

Disc 1

Disc 2

Bonus Tracks

The second CD includes seven bonus tracks, including the premiere version of the song "What If? – memorial vocal", featuring vocals by Yoko Takahashi and an instrumental version of it titled "What If? - memorial playback". https://www.eva-info.jp/18475 The other five bonus tracks make up the score for the features EVANGELION 3.0: (-46h) and EVANGELION 3.0 (-120 min.), both of which were included in the film's home video release.
